title: Autonomous loop scratch artifact inspection in operator plan v0
problem: Ticket-338 runs fixture-mode autonomous loop proofs to scratch paths under data/reports/operator_autonomous_loop/, but operator plan mode does not yet read autonomous_loop_report.json to surface research_quality_verdict or weakest_dimension for operator visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Operator plan includes last scratch autonomous loop quality verdict when report artifact exists.
Missing artifact reports honest not_run status without failing plan mode.
No queue writes or ticket promotion.
rollback_plan: Revert scratch inspection helper; execute-safe hook unchanged.
